title: Fix tracing signals with escaped dots in names
body:
Consider the following example verilated with `-fno-inline`:

```verilog
module t;
  sub \x.y  ();
  initial begin
    $write("*-* All finished *-*\n");
    $finish;
  end
endmodule

module sub;
        bit z;
endmodule
```

Incorrect VCD:
```
$version Generated by VerilatedVcd $end
$timescale 1ps $end
 $scope module top $end
  $scope module t $end
   $scope module y $end
    $var wire 1 # z $end
   $upscope $end
  $upscope $end
 $upscope $end
$enddefinitions $end


#0
0#
```
Note incorrect `y` module here.

This PR fixes this to:
```
$version Generated by VerilatedVcd $end
$timescale 1ps $end
 $scope module top $end
  $scope module t $end
   $scope module x.y $end
    $var wire 1 # z $end
   $upscope $end
  $upscope $end
 $upscope $end
$enddefinitions $end


#0
0#
```

This problem occurs when Verilating post-synthesis Yosys-emitted Verilog.
